name: Takeei Corporation
summary: Takeei Corporation engages in the environment management activities in Japan. The company provides environmental consulting services; issues measurement certificates; and analyzes water and drinking water, atmosphere, and asbestos, as well as measures noise and vibration, working environment, and inspect radioactive substances. It is also involved in the collection and transportation of waste; intermediary processing and recycling; and final disposal and reuse of landfill site. In addition, the company offers environmental engineering services; and engages in generating and selling biomass power. Takeei Corporation was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
